title: Doing research with us
summary: This Bank of England webpage describes collaboration opportunities for academics and researchers, including a PhD internship programme. It outlines the process for external researchers to work with Bank researchers on projects involving confidential data. The page does not contain market structure or macro catalyst information.
key_points: Bank of England invites collaboration with experienced academics and researchers on topics in their research agenda
PhD students can apply to a PhD internship programme
Projects using confidential data require collaboration with Bank researchers who can access such data
External researchers typically work with aggregated data and analytical outputs rather than raw confidential data
